Hero.description: Focused on scalability and clean code. I transform complex problems into efficient solutions using modern stacks, always looking for new ways to improve myself.

items.description: Implementation of a CRM for the complete management of the company's activity, from scratch with multiple modules developed such as clock-in with geolocation, connection with external API to obtain service contracts of interest to the company, etc.
Development and maintenance of the company's CRM, where various modules were carried out such as real-time inventory, assigned tasks, etc.
Various activities such as the development of a website for an exhibition by Alonso Quesada or Data Scraping from different sources to obtain relevant information for the company.

items.name: Project Vektor
items.description: A digital ecosystem built with React, Node.js and Framer Motion. This project redefines the standard interface by combining robust architecture with fluid micro-interactions and dark-mode aesthetics.

items.name: D'Agenda
items.description: High-performance backend service with comprehensive documentation. Integrating Redis caching and a scalable microservices approach.

items.name: Nexus UI
items.description: An open-source React component library focused on brutalist and dark themes. Highly customizable and built completely from scratch using CSS.

Footer.builtBy: Designed & built by Iker Hernández Santana
